FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition: //{KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD2}+', '+{KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD3}+', ' stringVar a := IF (NOT ISNULL({KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD1})) THEN {KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD1} ELSE ""; a+", "+ if (({KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD2}<>"") and {KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD3}<>"")then {KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD2} + ", " + {KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD3} +"," else if (isnull({KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD2}) or {KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD2}="") then {KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD3} +", " else if (isnull({KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD3}) or {KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD3}="") then {KSP_PurchaseReq;1.ADD2} + ", "
